title: uzJJK - Legacy
description: This datapack has been discontinued. Currently Including: Shrine, Limitless, Blood Manipulation.
body: This datapack has just been ported from Planet Minecraft to Modrinth. _So old beta versions are not available._ This is a Jujutsu Kaisen datapack, made by yours truly - uzwnrt. Please be sure to expect bugs, has this is the first update of release. Updates aren't **that** consistent, but you can join the discord and follow up on progress.
